headline: St. Vincent Behavioral Health Campus Expands Housing & Health Care for LA with $6M Health Net Investment
summary: Health Net, one of California's most experienced Medi-Cal managed care health plans and company of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), is partnering with the Centene Foundation to invest $6 million to support the development of the St. Vincent Behavioral Health Campus. The campus will offer behavioral health services and housing to people experiencing mental health and substance abuse challenges.

headline: Carolina Complete Health and WellCare of North Carolina Combine to Form Provider-Led Managed Care Organization
summary: Carolina Complete Health and WellCare of North Carolina, subsidiaries of the Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), today announced [receipt of regulatory approval] to close on their merger. The organization will operate under the Carolina Complete Health brand and serve more than 980,000 members across Medicaid, Medicare and Marketplace. headline: Centene's Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
